title: T2 Measurement: Dephasing and Echo Sequences
description: Master the measurement of qubit dephasing times using Ramsey, spin echo, and CPMG sequences. Understand the difference between T2* and T2, and learn advanced dynamical decoupling techniques.
learningObjectives: Distinguish between T2* (Ramsey) and T2 (echo) dephasing times
Implement Ramsey, Hahn echo, and CPMG pulse sequences
Analyze the relationship between T1, T2, and pure dephasing Tphi
Apply dynamical decoupling to extend coherence times
Extract noise spectral information from T2 measurements
